provenance.credentialBindingNote: n8n MCP đã sanitize trường credentials; binding trong export được phục hồi từ source repo/loại node và inventory credential đã phê duyệt, không được coi là live-verified.

parameters.query: SELECT 'supabase_ok' as check_name, (SELECT count(*) FROM system_config)::text as result UNION ALL SELECT 'total_documents', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents)::text UNION ALL SELECT 'sop_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE document_type = 'sop')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'guideline_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE document_type = 'guideline')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'form_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE document_type IN ('form', 'template'))::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_vi', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE language_code = 'vi')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_en', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE language_code = 'en')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_bilingual', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE language_code = 'vi-en')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_draft', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE status = 'draft')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_indexed', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE status = 'indexed')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_pending_review', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE status = 'reviewed')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'docs_approved', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE status = 'approved_for_ai_use')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'ai_translations_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM documents WHERE is_ai_translated = true AND translation_status = 'ai_translation_draft')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'total_chunks', (SELECT count(*) FROM document_chunks)::text UNION ALL SELECT 'total_ai_queries', (SELECT count(*) FROM ai_queries)::text UNION ALL SELECT 'pending_jobs', (SELECT count(*) FROM ingest_jobs WHERE status = 'pending')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'failed_jobs', (SELECT count(*) FROM ingest_jobs WHERE status = 'failed')::text UNION ALL SELECT 'total_users', (SELECT count(*) FROM user_profiles WHERE is_active = true)::text UNION ALL SELECT 'security_events', (SELECT count(*) FROM security_events WHERE resolved = false AND severity IN ('warning', 'critical'))::text;
